home_about_content: KhronosSMP is a small private Minecraft MORPG (multiplayer online role-playing game) with time as its main concept. Each second, your time's counter goes down by a second, only to be replenished by a trip to the Temple of Time, where through an interaction with a sacred object, you will gain an hour. Throughout that trip, you will face friends and foes; those who will help you cross the PvP zone, and those that will kill for time (or money) (or both). If you're planning to play, check out
navbar_rules_desc: The rulesets of our server, available in both English and Spanish.
navbar_info_desc: Find out how the server works in more detail. Also available in both English and Spanish!
